isi.lyrics:
Lyric RIIZE - Something's in the Water

Romanization

I couldn't save us in time
I don't do good by myself
I should have you by my side
nae ane gipge keojyeogan teumsae
ssaneulhan bam
hansunggan nal hwimorachin
goyohan soran
nuneul gamgo Breathe
Running all the way
All the way to your mind

Something wakes me up
Something's in the water
Staring me down
nareul dalmeun Eyes
naege mareul georeo
“Take me in”

Bad thoughts that mirror myself
Wake me up outside this hell
eogeunnan sumsori
heeonal su eomneun Nightmare
eoseo nuntteoya hae
wae ajik yeogie
na hollo meomchun chae
mwol chaja hemaeneun geonji
dwieongkin mulsare adeukhi jamgyeo
'Cause

Something wakes me up
Something's in the water
Staring me down
nareul dalmeun Eyes
naege mareul georeo
“Take me in”

Hangeul

I couldn't save us in time
I don't do good by myself
I should have you by my side
내 안에 깊게 커져간 틈새
싸늘한 밤
한순간 날 휘몰아친
고요한 소란
눈을 감고 Breathe
Running all the way
All the way to your mind

Something wakes me up
Something's in the water
Staring me down
나를 닮은 Eyes
내게 말을 걸어
“Take me in”

Bad thoughts that mirror myself
Wake me up outside this hell
어긋난 숨소리
헤어날 수 없는 Nightmare
어서 눈떠야 해
왜 아직 여기에
나 홀로 멈춘 채
뭘 찾아 헤매는 건지
뒤엉킨 물살에 아득히 잠겨
'Cause

Something wakes me up
Something's in the water
Staring me down
나를 닮은 Eyes
내게 말을 걸어
“Take me in”

isi.lyrics:
Lyric tripleS - Magic Shine New Zone

Romanization

If You Never Wake Up From A Dream,
It's Not A Dream. That's Reality.

kkumeseo kkaeeonaji anneundamyeon,
geugeon kkumi aniya. geugeon hyeonsiriya.

一生夢から覚めないなら、
それは夢じゃない。それは現実だよ。

若梦终究无法醒来，
那也许就不是梦。而是现实。

Hangeul

If You Never Wake Up From A Dream,
It's Not A Dream. That's Reality.

꿈에서 깨어나지 않는다면,
그건 꿈이 아니야. 그건 현실이야.

一生夢から覚めないなら、
それは夢じゃない。それは現実だよ。

若梦终究无法醒来，
那也许就不是梦。而是现实。
